scripts.db:setup: npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=./packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma db push --schema=./packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma db seed --schema=./packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev:question: npm run dev -w services/question-service
scripts.benchmark:question: ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe services/question-service/scripts/benchmark_question_detection.py
